title: Smoky Dutch Stew
description: A hearty, comforting stew made with smoky bacon and sweet corn, perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add the diced bacon and cook until crispy, then remove from pot.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the stew meat and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped carrot and potato, cook for 5 minutes.
Add the tomato paste (if using) and cook for 1 minute.
Add the stew broth and bring to a boil.
Return the bacon to the pot and simmer for 30 minutes.
Add the sweet corn and heavy cream (if using) and simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs (if desired)
